prompt:
A CSV-style export depicted as a tidy data grid on a tablet screen, showing rows and columns of numeric-looking blocks and timestamp-like shapes, but with all characters rendered unreadable. A small thermistor probe cable and a microcontroller sit beside the device, making it clear this is an export of hourly temperature readings from a logging rig.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future lab/desk setting: soft cinematic lighting, realistic screen reflections, no brand logos, and no readable text. Keep the data grid central and visually recognizable as a “CSV export” without actual legible characters.
